allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bmp = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\('F:\\wertus-digital\\assets\\logo.png'\); $colors = @{}; for \($x = 0; $x -lt $bmp.Width; $x += 3\) { for \($y = 0; $y -lt $bmp.Height; $y += 3\) { $c = $bmp.GetPixel\($x, $y\); if \($c.A -gt 200 -and $c.B -gt 120 -and \($c.B - $c.R\) -gt 60 -and \($c.B - $c.G\) -gt 40\) { $hex = '#{0:X2}{1:X2}{2:X2}' -f $c.R, $c.G, $c.B; if \($colors.ContainsKey\($hex\)\) { $colors[$hex]++ } else { $colors[$hex] = 1 } } } }; $bmp.Dispose\(\); $colors.GetEnumerator\(\) | Sort-Object Value -Descending | Select-Object -First 8)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bmp = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\('F:\\wertus-digital\\assets\\logo.png'\); $c = $bmp.GetPixel\(2, 2\); 'corner A={0} R={1} G={2} B={3}' -f $c.A, $c.R, $c.G, $c.B; 'size {0}x{1}' -f $bmp.Width, $bmp.Height; $bmp.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("$env:TEMP\\wertus-full.png"\); 'Source: {0}x{1}' -f $src.Width, $src.Height; $regions = @\(@{n='hero'; y=0; h=900}, @{n='portfolio'; y=2450; h=950}, @{n='pricing'; y=3350; h=1000}, @{n='faq-contact'; y=5000; h=1300}, @{n='footer'; y=6600; h=800}\); foreach \($r in $regions\) { $h = [Math]::Min\($r.h, $src.Height - $r.y\); $rect = New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0, $r.y, $src.Width, $h\); $crop = $src.Clone\($rect, $src.PixelFormat\); $crop.Save\("$env:TEMP\\wertus-$\($r.n\).png"\); $crop.Dispose\(\) }; $src.Dispose\(\); 'done')

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("$env:TEMP\\wertus-m375.png"\); 'src: {0}x{1}' -f $src.Width, $src.Height; $y = 0; $i = 0; while \($y -lt 7600\) { $h = [Math]::Min\(2500, 7600 - $y\); $rect = New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0, $y, 375, $h\); $crop = $src.Clone\($rect, $src.PixelFormat\); $crop.Save\("$env:TEMP\\wertus-m375-$i.png"\); $crop.Dispose\(\); $y += 2500; $i++ }; $src.Dispose\(\); 'crops done')

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("$env:TEMP\\wertus-m375b.png"\); 'src: {0}x{1}' -f $src.Width, $src.Height; $regions = @\(@{n='proc'; y=7500; h=2000}, @{n='faqk'; y=9500; h=2000}\); foreach \($r in $regions\) { $h = [Math]::Min\($r.h, $src.Height - $r.y\); $rect = New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0, $r.y, 375, $h\); $crop = $src.Clone\($rect, $src.PixelFormat\); $crop.Save\("$env:TEMP\\wertus-m375b-$\($r.n\).png"\); $crop.Dispose\(\) }; $src.Dispose\(\); 'done')
